title: Require Oclif Command Source Relationships
forbids: a command file without a default export, a dependency through another package's mechanical source or output tree, or a dependency from one command plugin to another
why: Oclif discovers command classes from one command root. The host composes command plugins, while their implementation depends on public service, resource, and library packages rather than another plugin or a mechanical package directory.
remediate: Default-export the command implementation from every command file. Replace command-plugin dependencies and mechanical package-directory imports with the owning service, resource, or library package's public entrypoint.
message: Oclif commands must be discoverable classes and remain on public package boundaries.
